settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure EVE Gatekeeper application settings
settings.apiConfigDesc: Configure the Gatekeeper backend API URL
settings.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Please check the URL.
settings.subscriptionDesc: Manage your EVE Gatekeeper Pro subscription
settings.subscribePrompt: Subscribe to unlock all premium features including AI analysis, priority alerts, and more.
settings.aboutText: EVE Gatekeeper is an intel and route planning tool for EVE Online pilots. It provides safe routing recommendations based on recent kill activity from zKillboard.
settings.feature1: Risk-aware route planning with multiple profiles
settings.feature2: Ship fitting analysis for travel recommendations
settings.feature3: Kill alerts via Discord and Slack webhooks
settings.feature5: Jump bridge and Thera connection support

pricing.title: Upgrade to EVE Gatekeeper Pro
pricing.subtitle: Get full access to all premium intel and navigation features. Stay ahead of threats and fly smarter.
pricing.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
pricing.cancelA: Yes. Cancel through the subscription management portal and you'll keep access until the end of your billing period.
pricing.paymentA: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay through our secure Stripe payment processing.
pricing.trialA: The base features are free. Subscribe to unlock premium intel analysis, AI-powered routing, and priority support.
